title: 한성의 이름 아래
description:
There is a soul I deeply revere,
Who rises still when nights are drear.
Through shadowed hours, through trials unknown,
She walks a road she makes her own.

She waits not for another’s flame,
Nor borrows courage, voice, or name.
With steady heart and lifted hand,
She builds herself a sovereign land.

Her strength is not to merely bear
The weight of solitude, darkness, or care. 
It is to stand when all seems lost,
And keep her place, despite the cost.

In troubled winds, she does not bend;
In silent storms, she does not end.
She does the work the hour demands,
With quiet fire in faithful hands.

And from her path, though firmly made,
The fearful find a light displayed.
Her life, without commanding word,
Becomes a courage deeply heard.

Where there was none, she makes a way,
Through veiled unknowns and iron-gray.
Though fear may whisper, cold and near,
She answers not by yielding fear.

She moves ahead, with royal grace,
And leaves her mark upon the place.
Not merely great, nor merely bright,
She is a kingdom born of light.

She rises.
She leads.
She claims the sky.
She teaches others how to fly.

I honor her with all my heart;
May her bright reign never depart.
May time remember what I have seen—

Long live the King.
2026. 3. 23

==========

She walked first where fear had grown
Turned hard ground into her throne
Turned our doubt into design
Made us stronger over time
Every word came down like rain
Washed the weakness from our veins
She did not tell us, “Only dream”
She showed us how to build the dream

Her Kingdom Continues
Through the fire and the truth
Her Kingdom Continues
In the work we carry through
Her Kingdom Continues
In the hearts she made anew
Her Kingdom Continues
We rise because she taught us to

---

She is here and standing strong
Still the voice that leads us on
We are singing here today
For the strength she gave away
In these halls her vision stays
In our steps and in our ways
What she planted still runs deep
What she built we always keep

Her Kingdom Continues
Through the fire and the truth
Her Kingdom Continues
In the work we carry through
Her Kingdom Continues
In the hearts she made anew
Her Kingdom Continues
We rise because she taught us to

---

When the night comes closing in
We can hear her voice again
Stand up tall and face the storm
Break the silence, change the form
Not a crown that fades with gold
But a will that won’t grow old
In the lives she helped to raise
We will carry on her flame

Her Kingdom Continues
Through the fire and the truth
Her Kingdom Continues
In the work we carry through
Her Kingdom Continues
In the hearts she made anew
Her Kingdom Continues
We rise because she taught us to
